testcase.name: TC-FLOW-PROFILE | Edit → Save → Verify Persistence › TC-FLOW-PROFILE-01: Given I am on my profile, When I click Edit Profile, Then the edit form opens
TC-FLOW-PROFILE | Edit → Save → Verify Persistence › TC-FLOW-PROFILE-02: Given the edit form is open, When I update the bio and save, Then a success indicator appears or the page navigates back
TC-FLOW-PROFILE | Edit → Save → Verify Persistence › TC-FLOW-PROFILE-03: Given I save a bio update, When I reload the profile page, Then the updated bio is still shown
TC-FLOW-PROFILE | Edit → Save → Verify Persistence › TC-FLOW-PROFILE-04: Given I am viewing my own profile, When I click Share Profile, Then a share link or dialog appears
TC-FLOW-NEWS | Bookmark → Verify → Unbookmark › TC-FLOW-NEWS-01: Given I am on the news page, When I bookmark an article, Then the bookmark icon changes state
TC-FLOW-NEWS | Bookmark → Verify → Unbookmark › TC-FLOW-NEWS-02: Given I have bookmarked an article, When I navigate to the saved/bookmarks section, Then the article appears there
TC-FLOW-NEWS | Bookmark → Verify → Unbookmark › TC-FLOW-NEWS-03: Given I click on a news article, When the article detail loads, Then the full article content is visible
TC-FLOW-NEWS | Bookmark → Verify → Unbookmark › TC-FLOW-NEWS-04: Given I am reading an article, When I click the back button, Then I return to the news feed
TC-FLOW-NEWS | Bookmark → Verify → Unbookmark › TC-FLOW-NEWS-05: Given I am on the news page, When I search for a keyword, Then the results are filtered to matching articles
TC-FLOW-NOTIF | Load → Read → Mark All Read › TC-FLOW-NOTIF-01: Given I navigate to notifications, When the page loads, Then the notification list or empty state is visible
TC-FLOW-NOTIF | Load → Read → Mark All Read › TC-FLOW-NOTIF-02: Given there are notifications, When I click one, Then it navigates to the relevant content
TC-FLOW-NOTIF | Load → Read → Mark All Read › TC-FLOW-NOTIF-03: Given I am on the notifications page, When I click Mark All Read, Then unread indicators disappear
testcase.error:
[chromium] › flows\social.flow.spec.js:152:7 › TC-FLOW-NOTIF | Load → Read → Mark All Read › TC-FLOW-NOTIF-03: Given I am on the notifications page, When I click Mark All Read, Then unread indicators disappear
Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded.
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-15_10-15-30\artifacts\flows-social.flow-TC-FLOW--9a229-unread-indicators-disappear-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-15_10-15-30\artifacts\flows-social.flow-TC-FLOW--9a229-unread-indicators-disappear-chromium\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\test-results\2026-06-15_10-15-30\artifacts\flows-social.flow-TC-FLOW--9a229-unread-indicators-disappear-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-FLOW-FRIENDS | Send Request → Verify Pending State › TC-FLOW-FRIENDS-01: Given I am on the friends/discover page, When I click Add Friend on a suggestion, Then the button state changes to pending or requested
TC-FLOW-FRIENDS | Send Request → Verify Pending State › TC-FLOW-FRIENDS-02: Given I am on the friends page, When I search for a user by name, Then matching results are shown
TC-FLOW-FRIENDS | Send Request → Verify Pending State › TC-FLOW-FRIENDS-03: Given I have friend requests, When I view the requests tab, Then incoming requests are listed
TC-FLOW-GROUPS | Join → Post → Verify › TC-FLOW-GROUPS-01: Given I am on the groups page, When I open the first group, Then the group feed or detail page loads
TC-FLOW-GROUPS | Join → Post → Verify › TC-FLOW-GROUPS-02: Given I am inside a group, When I type in the post composer and submit, Then the post appears in the group feed
TC-FLOW-GROUPS | Join → Post → Verify › TC-FLOW-GROUPS-03: Given I find a group I have not joined, When I click Join, Then the button changes to Joined or Leave
Page Load and Layout › TC-OMNIAI-01: Given I am authenticated, When I navigate to the page, Then correct URL
Page Load and Layout › TC-OMNIAI-02: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then Omni AI heading is visible
Page Load and Layout › TC-OMNIAI-03: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then main content area renders with child elements
Page Load and Layout › TC-OMNIAI-04: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then sidebar or navigation is present
Page Load and Layout › TC-OMNIAI-05: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then page does not produce uncaught JS errors on load
AI Tool Tiles and Options › TC-OMNIAI-06: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then AI tool tiles or option cards are visible
AI Tool Tiles and Options › TC-OMNIAI-07: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then tool tiles have readable title labels
AI Tool Tiles and Options › TC-OMNIAI-08: Given I am on the tool tiles, When I view it, Then it displays description text
AI Tool Tiles and Options › TC-OMNIAI-09: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then multiple AI tool options are listed
AI Tool Tiles and Options › TC-OMNIAI-10: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then tool icons or illustrations accompany the tiles
Tool Selection › TC-OMNIAI-11: Given the tool tile is present, When I click the tool tile, Then it opens the tool interface
Tool Selection › TC-OMNIAI-12: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then selected tool tab or state is visually indicated
Tool Selection › TC-OMNIAI-13: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then text generation tool or chat is accessible
Tool Selection › TC-OMNIAI-14: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then image generation tool or option is accessible
Input Field and Generate Action › TC-OMNIAI-15: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then prompt input field is present
Input Field and Generate Action › TC-OMNIAI-16: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then typing in prompt field accepts input
Input Field and Generate Action › TC-OMNIAI-17: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then generate or submit button is present and enabled
Input Field and Generate Action › TC-OMNIAI-18: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then output or response area exists in the DOM
Settings, Clear, and History › TC-OMNIAI-19: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then clear or reset button is present when input exists
Settings, Clear, and History › TC-OMNIAI-20: Given the page is loaded, When I click clear resets the prompt input, Then it responds correctly
Settings, Clear, and History › TC-OMNIAI-21: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then model selector or settings control is accessible
Settings, Clear, and History › TC-OMNIAI-22: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then history or recent generations panel is accessible
Settings, Clear, and History › TC-OMNIAI-23: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then copy output button is present after generation
Settings, Clear, and History › TC-OMNIAI-24: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then page renders without critical console errors
Generate Action, Validation and Model Switching › TC-OMNIAI-25: Given I have typed a prompt and clicked Generate, When generation runs, Then an output area receives content
Generate Action, Validation and Model Switching › TC-OMNIAI-26: untestable: error state when generation fails — requires backend to be down or quota exceeded, not reproducible in CI
Generate Action, Validation and Model Switching › TC-OMNIAI-27: Given the prompt input is empty, When I click Generate, Then the button is disabled or an error/validation message appears

Generate Action, Validation and Model Switching › TC-OMNIAI-28: untestable: rate limiting or quota error display requires the API quota to be exhausted, which cannot be triggered deterministically in CI
Generate Action, Validation and Model Switching › TC-OMNIAI-29: Given output text is present, When I click the copy button, Then the button text changes or a toast confirmation appears
Generate Action, Validation and Model Switching › TC-OMNIAI-30: Given the history section shows past generations, When I click clear history, Then the history section becomes empty
Generate Action, Validation and Model Switching › TC-OMNIAI-31: Given a model selector is present, When I switch to a different model, Then the UI label updates to reflect the selected model
Page Load and Layout › TC-MSG-01: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then messages page loads at correct URL
Page Load and Layout › TC-MSG-02: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then messages heading or title is visible
Page Load and Layout › TC-MSG-03: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then conversation list panel renders
Page Load and Layout › TC-MSG-04: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then new message compose button is present
Page Load and Layout › TC-MSG-05: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then page does not have uncaught JS errors on load
Conversation List › TC-MSG-06: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then at least one conversation is visible
Conversation List › TC-MSG-07: Given I am on the each conversation, When I view it, Then it shows the contact name
Conversation List › TC-MSG-08: Given I am on the each conversation, When I view it, Then it shows a last-message preview
Conversation List › TC-MSG-09: Given I am on the each conversation, When I view it, Then it shows a timestamp
Conversation List › TC-MSG-10: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then unread conversations are visually distinguished
Conversation List › TC-MSG-11: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then conversation list has a search input
Conversation List › TC-MSG-12: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then searching filters the conversation list
Conversation List › TC-MSG-13: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then conversation item has an avatar or profile picture
Opening a Conversation › TC-MSG-14: Given the conversation is present, When I click the conversation, Then it opens the chat panel
Opening a Conversation › TC-MSG-15: Given I am on the chat header, When I view it, Then it shows the contact name
Opening a Conversation › TC-MSG-16: Given I am on the chat header, When I view it, Then it shows the contact avatar
Opening a Conversation › TC-MSG-17: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then message history renders in the chat panel
Opening a Conversation › TC-MSG-18: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then message input field is visible
Opening a Conversation › TC-MSG-19: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then back button or navigation returns to conversation list
Opening a Conversation › TC-MSG-20: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then online status indicator is visible
Sending Messages › TC-MSG-21: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then message input accepts typed text
Sending Messages › TC-MSG-22: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then send button is disabled when input is empty
Sending Messages › TC-MSG-23: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then send button enables after typing a message
Sending Messages › TC-MSG-24: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then pressing Enter sends the message
Sending Messages › TC-MSG-25: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then input clears after message is sent
Sending Messages › TC-MSG-26: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then sent message appears in the chat thread
Message Input Toolbar › TC-MSG-27: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then emoji button is present in the message input area
Message Input Toolbar › TC-MSG-28: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then attachment or media button is present in message input area
Message Input Toolbar › TC-MSG-29: Given the emoji button is present, When I click the emoji button, Then it opens an emoji picker
Message Input Toolbar › TC-MSG-30: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then message input supports multiline with Shift+Enter
Message Actions › TC-MSG-31: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then hovering a message reveals action options
Message Actions › TC-MSG-32: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then own message has a delete option
Message Actions › TC-MSG-33: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then message timestamps are visible
Message Actions › TC-MSG-34: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then message read receipt or delivered indicator is present
New Conversation › TC-MSG-35: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then compose new message button opens a recipient search
New Conversation › TC-MSG-36: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then it shows user suggestions
New Conversation › TC-MSG-37: Given I am on the page, When I interact with the element, Then new message dialog can be dismissed
Unread State › TC-MSG-38: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then unread message count badge is shown if unread messages exist
Unread State › TC-MSG-39: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then opening an unread conversation marks it as read
Unread State › TC-MSG-40: Given I am on the messages nav link, When I view it, Then it shows unread badge on home page
Message History and Pagination › TC-MSG-41: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then scrolling up in a conversation loads older messages
Message History and Pagination › TC-MSG-42: Given I am on the chat panel, When I view it, Then it shows a date separator between messages
Message History and Pagination › TC-MSG-43: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then chat is scrolled to the most recent message on open

Group Conversations › TC-MSG-45: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then conversation info or details panel is accessible

Voice and Video Calls › TC-MSG-53: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then video call UI has camera toggle button

Group Management › TC-MSG-154: Given I am on the page, When I interact with the element, Then group name can be edited from the group info panel
Archived and Favourite Conversations › TC-MSG-155: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then archived chats section is accessible from the messages page
Archived and Favourite Conversations › TC-MSG-156: Given the Archived is present, When I click the Archived, Then it opens the archived conversations list
Archived and Favourite Conversations › TC-MSG-157: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then favourites section is accessible from the messages page
Archived and Favourite Conversations › TC-MSG-158: Given the Favourites is present, When I click the Favourites, Then it opens the favourites conversation list
Archived and Favourite Conversations › TC-MSG-159: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then a conversation added to favourites appears in the Favourites section
Archived and Favourite Conversations › TC-MSG-160: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then unarchiving a conversation restores it to the main list
Message Scheduling › TC-MSG-161: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then schedule send option is present in message compose area
Message Scheduling › TC-MSG-162: Given the schedule is present, When I click the schedule, Then it opens a date and time picker
Message Scheduling › TC-MSG-163: Given I am on the a scheduled message, When I view it, Then it shows in a pending or scheduled state
Disappearing Messages › TC-MSG-164: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then disappearing messages toggle is accessible from conversation settings
Disappearing Messages › TC-MSG-165: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then it shows timer duration options
Disappearing Messages › TC-MSG-166: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then disappearing messages off option is available
Bulk Operations › TC-MSG-167: Given I am on the page, When I interact with the element, Then long press or select mode can be activated on conversations
Bulk Operations › TC-MSG-168: Given I am on the page, When I interact with the element, Then multiple conversations can be selected in select mode
Bulk Operations › TC-MSG-169: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then bulk delete option appears when conversations are selected
Bulk Operations › TC-MSG-170: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then bulk archive option appears when conversations are selected
Encryption › TC-MSG-171: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then encryption indicator icon is present in the chat header if end-to-end encrypted
Encryption › TC-MSG-172: Given the the encryption indicator is present, When I click the the encryption indicator, Then it shows encryption details or tooltip
Group Conversation Creation Workflow › TC-MSG-173: Given I am on the messages page, When I look for a New Group or + button, Then I can initiate group conversation creation
Message Edit Functionality › TC-MSG-174: Given I am on a sent message, When I hover to reveal the action menu, Then an Edit option may be available

error.message: Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded while running "beforeEach" hook.

testcase.error:
[chromium] › social\messages.spec.js:2851:7 › Message Edit Functionality › TC-MSG-174: Given I am on a sent message, When I hover to reveal the action menu, Then an Edit option may be available
Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded while running "beforeEach" hook.

testcase.name: Typing Indicator › TC-MSG-178: Given another user is typing, When the typing indicator appears, Then it is shown in the chat — untestable: requires a second active authenticated session sending real-time events

Message Encryption Security › TC-MSG-179: Given messages are transmitted, When inspecting network traffic, Then message payloads are encrypted in transit — untestable: requires network-level inspection outside browser context
Call Recording › TC-MSG-180: Given a call is in progress, When the user records it, Then the recording is saved — untestable: requires two live call participants and media recording API access
